intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC执法趋严，SEP战场转向英国
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Enforcement Tightens, SEP Battles Shift to UK
intel_overview.summary_zh: 本季度欧洲IP态势呈现“执法硬化”与“程序分流”双重特征。统一专利法院（UPC）在倍耐力及瑞德西韦案中展现强硬立场，确立高赔偿与严无效标准，成为维权首选地。与此同时，SEP全球费率裁决权向英国法院集中，华为、诺基亚等巨头纷纷将FRAND争议聚焦伦敦。EPO加速无纸化并强化AI审查辅助，EUIPO则通过IP融资合作及手工业地理标志扩展，深化IP资产商业化生态。
top_signals: UPC米兰分部在侵权与无效案件中确立高标准裁判口径
SEP FRAND费率裁决重心从德国/UPC向英国高等法院转移
EPO推进2027全面无纸化并拟强制要求指明修改依据
利摩日瓷器注册为首个欧盟手工业地理标志，制度落地
cross_currents: 司法管辖博弈：UPC虽具泛欧效力，但复杂SEP定价权仍被英国法院凭借普通法优势吸纳
合规成本分化：UPC诉讼效率提升降低维权门槛，但败诉方高额费用风险显著增加
资产金融化加速：官方机构从单纯确权转向推动IP质押融资，强调IP作为增长驱动力
implications: 中国企业在欧面临UPC高频诉讼风险，需建立针对米兰等活跃分部的快速响应机制
涉及SEP许可时，应重点监控英国法院判例，利用其费率裁决影响全球许可谈判
出口产品需警惕二手市场假冒指南带来的平台下架风险，加强供应链溯源管理
watchlist: EPO 2027指南中关于异议程序修改依据的强制性规定细则
英国高等法院在华为/TP-Link案中确定的最终FRAND费率水平
UPC上诉法院对G 1/25决定及新兴技术专利适格性的后续判例

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC判例确立终审权，英德执法趋严
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Asserts Finality; UK Fees Rise and Germany Tightens Enforcement
daily_report.executive_line: UPC上诉院确立对未决关键点的终局裁决权，倍耐力胜诉中国胎企；英国上调商标费并严打二手假冒，德国电池专利激增，欧盟拟立法修补AI版权漏洞。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口欧洲IP态势呈现“司法确权”与“行政收紧”双轨并行。UPC上诉院通过新判例强化终审效率，米兰分院裁定中国胎企侵权，显示跨境执法力度加大。英国UKIPO发布二手时尚防伪指南并上调25%商标费率，压缩低成本注册空间。德国DPMA数据显示电池技术专利申请激增，亚洲主导市场。欧盟层面正酝酿针对生成式AI的独立版权立法，以弥补现有文本挖掘例外之不足。

storylines.what_happened_zh: UPC上诉院裁定即使初审未决亦将对关键点作出终局裁决；米兰分院判倍耐力胜诉两家中国胎企。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 确立上诉院终局裁决权提升诉讼确定性；针对中国企业的胜诉警示跨境侵权高风险。

storylines.why_it_matters_en: New rules may reshape compliance boundaries for AI training data, addressing perceived imbalances in current text and data mining exceptions for rightholders and developers.

report_items.title_zh: 放心购买二手商品：避免假冒时尚新品指南
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Avoiding Counterfeit Goods in Second-Hand Fashion Market
report_items.title: Shop second-hand with confidence
report_items.summary_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，旨在帮助消费者在蓬勃发展的二手市场中避免购买到假冒时尚商品。此前数据显示，四分之一的消费者曾在不知情的情况下买到假货。该指南支持购物者充分利用英国二手市场，同时提升对假冒产品的识别能力。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued new government guidance designed to help consumers avoid purchasing counterfeit fashion items. This initiative supports shoppers in navigating the UK's growing pre-loved market, addressing concerns that one in four buyers previously acquired fake goods unknowingly. The guidance aims to enhance consumer confidence and awareness regarding product authenticity in second-hand transactions.
core_points_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品
背景数据显示，此前有四分之一的消费者曾在不知情下购买了假冒时尚产品
指南旨在支持购物者安全利用英国繁荣的二手（pre-loved）消费市场
core_points_en: New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets.
Data indicates one in four shoppers previously bought fakes without realizing it.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This publication highlights official attention to trademark infringement risks within the expanding second-hand economy. For rights holders, it signals a continued focus on consumer education as a complement to enforcement. Stakeholders should observe if this guidance leads to updated platform obligations or specific compliance expectations for resellers.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official consumer advice.
Practice note: The guidance underscores the importance of clear authenticity markers for goods entering the secondary market to reduce consumer confusion.
What to monitor: Watch for any subsequent updates linking this consumer guidance to specific enforcement actions or platform liability frameworks.

report_items.title_zh: 指南：如何在二手购物时识别假冒时尚商品
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Identifying Counterfeit Fashion in Second-Hand Markets
report_items.title: Guidance: How to spot fake fashion when shopping second-hand
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布指南，旨在帮助消费者理解如何识别在转售平台上销售的假冒产品，并提供举报相关 listings 的具体步骤。该文件属于官方发布的操作指引，聚焦于二手市场中的知识产权侵权识别与应对流程。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published guidance to assist consumers in identifying counterfeit fashion items sold through second-hand resale platforms. The document outlines practical steps for recognizing fake products and provides instructions on how to report suspicious listings. This resource aims to enhance awareness of trademark infringement risks within the secondary market, offering a structured approach for rights holders and buyers to address potential counterfeiting issues on digital marketplaces.
core_points_zh: 原文摘要显示，指南核心目的是帮助识别转售平台上的假冒产品
原文明确指出，指南包含举报可疑 listings 的具体操作步骤
core_points_en: Guidance helps identify counterfeit fashion products on resale platforms.
Document outlines specific steps for reporting suspicious listings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance highlights regulatory attention to trademark enforcement in the growing second-hand economy. For brand owners, it underscores the importance of clear consumer education and accessible reporting mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms integrate these identification tips into their compliance frameworks may reveal evolving standards for intermediary liability and user-generated content moderation in the UK.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands should review if their anti-counterfeiting materials align with UKIPO identification criteria for secondary markets.
Practice note: The guidance emphasizes consumer participation in enforcement by providing clear reporting pathways for suspicious listings.
What to monitor: Observe whether resale platforms update their terms or detection tools in response to this official guidance.

report_items.title_zh: DPMA 2025年报：电池技术专利申请大幅增长
report_items.title_en: DPMA 2025 Annual Report: Battery Technology Patent Filings Surge Significantly
report_items.title: DPMA-Jahresbericht 2025: Patentanmeldungen zur Batterietechnik enorm gestiegen
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）发布2025年年度报告，重点统计了专利、实用新型等申请数据。报告显示，2025年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增长25.8%至9090件。尽管德国本土申请显著增加并排名第四，但亚洲申请人仍主导德国市场的电池专利排名。此外，风能专利申请量亦有所上升。报告强调知识产权保护对进步至关重要。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has published its 2025 Annual Report, highlighting statistical trends in patents, utility models, trademarks, and designs. A key finding is a 25.8 percent year-on-year increase in published patent applications for battery technology, totaling 9,090 filings. While Asian applicants continue to dominate the rankings for the German market, domestic filings from German companies and research institutions have risen substantially, securing fourth place. The report also notes an increase in wind power patent applications. Available in digital HTML and PD...
core_points_zh: 年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速
亚洲国家主导德国市场电池专利申请排名，德国本土申请大增位列第四
DPMA发布2025年报，涵盖专利统计及数字时代知识产权保护趋势分析
core_points_en: Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics in the sector.
Asian applicants dominate battery patent rankings in Germany, while domestic German filings increased significantly to reach fourth place.
The report highlights rising wind power patent applications and provides guidance on digital brand protection and design rights.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This data underscores the intensifying competitive landscape in energy storage within the German jurisdiction. Rights holders should note the strong presence of Asian entities and the growing domestic activity. Monitoring these publication trends is essential for understanding technological evolution and assessing the density of prior art in battery and renewable energy sectors.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects targeting the German market.
Practice note: The DPMA’s analysis combines national and European patent data effective in Germany, offering a comprehensive view of protection strategies employed by competitors.
What to monitor: Track the specific technical subclasses within battery and wind power filings to identify emerging sub-technologies and key active assignees.

report_items.title_zh: 英国商标注册簿150周年：律所代理的标志性品牌回顾
report_items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Register at 150: Iconic Brands and Historical Milestones
report_items.title: 150 years of the UK trade mark register: iconic brands we represent
report_items.summary_zh: 为纪念英国商标注册簿成立150周年，D Young & Co回顾了自1876年首个商标（Bass红三角）注册以来的历史。文章列举了该律所代理的多个维多利亚时代起源的知名品牌，包括Grants Morella樱桃白兰地、Ardbeg威士忌、Listerine漱口水、Vicks Vaporub、Fairy肥皂、Anusol药品及Gillette剃须刀，并详述了它们在英国的首次注册时间与背景，展示了英国商标体系的长期演变。
report_items.summary_en: Marking the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, D Young & Co reflects on historic registrations starting with the Bass red triangle in 1876. The firm highlights long-standing client brands such as Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, Ardbeg, Listerine, Vicks Vaporub, Fairy, and Anusol. These examples illustrate the continuity of protection for diverse goods, from spirits to pharmaceuticals, with many marks originating in the Victorian era. The analysis underscores the stability of the UK system, noting that early registrations remain active today alongside millions of newer entries, demo...
core_points_zh: 英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效
律所代理的最古老商标为1876年注册的Grants Morella樱桃白兰地图形商标
列举了Ardbeg、Listerine、Vicks等品牌在20世纪初获得英国商标保护的…
core_points_en: The first UK trade mark, Bass red triangle, was registered on 1 January 1876 and remains protected today.
D Young & Co represents Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, its oldest client mark, registered in June 1876.
Iconic brands like Ardbeg, Listerine, and Fairy secured early UK registrations between 1903 and 1911.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文主要为律所品牌宣传与历史回顾，通过展示长期代理的经典案例体现专业能力。对于关注英国市场的企业而言，这些百年品牌的持续注册状态证明了英国商标制度的稳定性。实务中可参考此类长寿品牌的维护策略，但文中未涉及具体法律争议或最新审查标准变化，仅作历史性事实陈述。
report_items.insight_en: This retrospective highlights the longevity of UK trade mark rights, offering reassurance regarding the stability of the register. For rights holders, it emphasizes the strategic value of maintaining historic marks. While primarily illustrative, it reminds practitioners that early adoption of registration provides lasting competitive advantages and brand equity preservation across generations.
insight_points_zh: 英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护
传统快消与医药品牌在英国商标历史上占据重要地位，注册历史悠久
律所通过展示长期客户案例，强调其在英国商标领域的资深经验与稳定性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Historic brands demonstrate that continuous use and renewal can sustain trade mark rights for over a century, reinforcing long-term asset value.
Practice note: Early registration dates, such as those for Ardbeg and Listerine, show how foundational marks were secured before modern classification systems fully evolved.
What to monitor: Track the status of legacy marks to ensure compliance with current use requirements while leveraging their historical distinctiveness in enforcement.

report_items.title_zh: 2026年5月商标法律与实务概览
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Trade Mark Fee Increases Effective April 2026: Key Updates
report_items.title: Trade Mark Law & Practice at a Glance – May 2026 - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE发布2026年5月商标法律与实务更新。核心事实为自2026年4月1日起，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）新收费标准生效，整体平均涨幅达25%。具体包括在线提交英国商标申请费由170英镑涨至205英镑，每增加一个类别的费用由50英镑涨至60英镑。
report_items.summary_en: GJE’s May 2026 trade mark law update highlights significant changes to UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) fees. Effective 1 April 2026, new official fees came into force, representing an average increase of 25 percent across various procedures. Specifically, the cost for filing a UK trade mark application online has risen from GBP 170 to GBP 205. Additionally, the fee for each additional class included in an application has increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60. These adjustments impact the baseline costs for securing trade mark protection in the United Kingdom. Rights holders and applicants ma...
core_points_zh: 年4月1日起UKIPO新费率生效，平均涨幅25%
英国商标在线申请费从170英镑上调至205英镑
商标申请每增加一个类别的费用从50英镑上调至60英镑
core_points_en: New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase.
Online UK trade mark application fees rose from GBP 170 to GBP 205 per application.
Fees for each additional class in a trade mark application increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60.

report_items.insight_en: The 25 percent average fee increase materially affects the cost structure for UK trade mark registrations. In-house counsel and brand owners should recalibrate annual IP budgets to accommodate higher filing costs, particularly for multi-class applications. While the base filing fee rise is notable, the incremental cost per additional class also warrants review for portfolio optimization. Practitioners should ensure t...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.
Practice note: The increase in per-class fees may influence decisions on class breadth versus separate filings in portfolio management.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO communications regarding potential procedural changes or additional fee adjustments in other trademark-related services.

report_items.title_zh: 上诉院即使初审未决亦将对关键点作出裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules on Final Decisions and Legal Interest in Rematec v Europe Forestry
report_items.title: Court of Appeal to rule on major points even if missing from first instance decision (UPC_CoA_302/2025, UPC_CoA_305/2025)
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院在Rematec诉Europe Forestry案中推翻曼海姆分院判决，认定专利有效且侵权。裁决明确：若独立权利要求无效导致撤销反诉失败，无需审查从属权利要求充分性；上诉院通常应自行作出终局裁决而非发回重审，除非例外情况；发布判决需证明原告存在合法利益。
report_items.summary_en: In Rematec v. Europe Forestry, the UPC Court of Appeal clarified procedural standards under the UPCA. It held that assessing sufficiency for dependent claims is unnecessary if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim due to lack of legal interest. Under Article 75(1) UPCA, the Court of Appeal generally issues a final decision when setting aside a first instance judgment, including ruling on infringement. Referral back to the first instance is exceptional; the lower court’s prior omission of infringement findings, based on invalidity, does not typically justify remand. Additional...
core_points_zh: 若针对独立权利要求的撤销反诉已失败，因缺乏法律利益，无需审查从属权利要求是否充分公开
依据UPCA第75条，上诉院撤销初审判决后通常应自行作出终局裁决，包括对侵权诉讼作出决定
初审未裁决侵权问题通常不构成发回重审的例外情形；发布判决需考量原告是否存在合法利益
core_points_en: No legal interest exists to assess dependent claim sufficiency if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim.
The Court of Appeal generally renders a final decision on infringement when setting aside a first instance judgment.
Failure of the first instance to rule on infringement due to invalidity does not normally justify referral back.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment reinforces the UPC Court of Appeal’s role in delivering final resolutions, minimizing referrals back to the first instance even when infringement was not previously examined. Rights holders should anticipate comprehensive appellate rulings covering both validity and infringement. Furthermore, parties seeking publication of decisions must proactively substantiate their legitimate interest, as such orders...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appellate proceedings may now conclude with binding infringement findings, reducing prolonged litigation cycles through remands.
Practice note: Claimants must explicitly plead and evidence legitimate interest when requesting publication of judgments under Article 80 UPCA.
What to monitor: Future applications of the ‘exceptional circumstances’ test for referrals back to the first instance under Rule 242.2(b) RoP.

The firm achieved high notoriety recognition in three strategic categories: electronic, telecommunications and new technology patents; general patents; and physics, mechanics and construction patents. This distinction underscores BCF Global’s positioning in the European intellectual property market and its capacity to support innovative companies in protecting and valuing technological assets across Europe and North America. 在电子电信、一般专利、物理机械建筑三个战略类别中获得高知名度评级
强调由Marion Fauré和Philippe Thérias领导的跨大西洋一体化工…

Recognition covers electronic, general, and mechanical patent categories within the French market.
Firm emphasizes integrated transatlantic patent services led by Marion Fauré and Philippe Thérias.
report_items.insight_zh: 此动态反映头部律所通过跨国协作强化专利组合管理能力的市场趋势。对于关注欧洲专利布局的企业而言，了解具备跨法域（特别是法美加）协同能力的服务机构有助于优化知识产权资产管理策略，需持续观察此类评级对法律服务选择的影响。

The specific category recognitions provide a reference point for rights holders evaluating counsel for technical sectors such as electronics and mechanical engineering. For in-house teams, this highlights the value of firms...

行业评级机构对细分技术领域（如电子、机械）专业度的认可成为市场参考
需关注具备跨法域协同能力的服务团队在欧洲专利实务中的表现

report_items.title_zh: 量子计算第二部分：量子时代的知识产权
report_items.title_en: Quantum Computing IP: EU Patent Output Lags Behind Company Presence
report_items.title: Quantum Computing — Part 2: Intellectual Property In The Quantum Age
report_items.summary_zh: 本文指出专利对保护量子行业创新至关重要，涵盖硬件、软件及算法等领域。尽管欧盟拥有全球32%的量子科技公司，但其相关专利仅占全球6%，远低于中国和美国。不过，2021至2024年间欧盟量子专利申请量翻倍，显示意识提升。芬兰表现突出，在欧洲量子专利申请中排名第四。
report_items.summary_en: Patents are critical for protecting innovations in quantum computing, communication, and sensing. While the EU hosts 32% of global quantum companies, it accounts for only 6% of related patents, trailing China and the US. However, EU patent filings doubled between 2021 and 2024, signaling increased strategic awareness. Finland ranks fourth globally in quantum patent activity per EPO and OECD data. The analysis highlights hardware infrastructure, including cryogenic systems and error correction, as significant areas for patentable innovation alongside core algorithms and software.
core_points_zh: 欧盟量子企业数量占全球32%，但相关专利仅占全球6%，存在产出缺口
至2024年欧盟量子技术专利申请量翻倍，反映IP保护意识增强
芬兰在量子技术专利申请方面表现优异，居欧洲第四，体现其生态优势
core_points_en: EU hosts 32% of quantum firms but holds only 6% of global patents, revealing a significant output gap.
Quantum patent filings in the EU doubled from 2021 to 2024, indicating growing IP protection awareness.
Finland ranks fourth globally in quantum patent activity, highlighting specific regional strengths within Europe.
report_items.insight_zh: 欧盟量子产业面临专利产出与企业规模不匹配的挑战，但近期申请量增长显示积极趋势。从业者需关注量子技术快速迭代对专利生命周期的影响，以及欧洲在硬件基础设施等领域的专利布局机会。
report_items.insight_en: European rights holders should address the disparity between market presence and patent volume by securing rights in hardware infrastructure and algorithms. The recent surge in filings suggests a maturing portfolio strategy. Monitoring high-activity jurisdictions like Finland can inform competitive benchmarking and collaboration opportunities in the evolving quantum landscape.
insight_points_zh: 欧盟量子企业需加强专利布局以匹配其市场地位，弥补与中美差距
量子技术迭代速度快于专利审批周期，可能导致授权前技术过时风险
关注芬兰等欧洲国家在量子生态中的专利活跃度及潜在合作机会
insight_points_en: Client relevance: EU-based quantum entities must align IP portfolios with their market share to mitigate competitive disadvantages against US and Chinese rivals.
Practice note: Drafting strategies should encompass physical infrastructure, such as cryogenic cooling and control electronics, not just core quantum algorithms.
What to monitor: Track the sustained growth in EU quantum patent filings and specific national trends, such as Finland’s high-ranking performance.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟版权与AI政策制定中的盲点？
report_items.title_en: European Commission Launches Targeted Copyright Initiative Addressing Generative AI Challenges
report_items.title: A Blind Spot at the Heart of EU Copyright and AI Policymaking?
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会发布证据征集令，确认计划对欧盟版权框架进行新的立法干预，重点解决生成式AI带来的挑战。该举措独立于正在进行的《数字单一市场版权指令》审查，后者预计不会重新开放文本。新倡议涵盖AI挑战、在线盗版、录音制品及研究例外等四个领域，旨在改善欧洲创意与创新环境。
report_items.summary_en: The European Commission has published a call for evidence confirming plans for new legislative intervention in the EU copyright framework. This targeted initiative, distinct from the ongoing review of the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, aims to address challenges linked to artificial intelligence and other specific areas. The Commission expects measures to tackle market and technological developments associated with generative AI. While the Directive review proceeds in parallel without reopening its text, this new initiative covers four domains: AI-related creator challenges...
core_points_zh: 欧盟委员会确认计划进行新的立法干预，以应对生成式AI对版权框架造成的破坏
此次针对AI的措施独立于《数字单一市场版权指令》的平行审查，后者预计不修改原文
现有文本挖掘例外未能平衡技术发展与控制权，退出机制未成为有效的许可杠杆
core_points_en: Commission confirms new legislative intervention targeting AI challenges, separate from the ongoing CDSM Directive review process.
Initiative covers four areas: AI impacts, live event piracy, third-country sound recordings, and research exception harmonization.
Existing text and data mining exceptions failed to balance technology development with rightholder control and value participation.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This development indicates that EU policymakers prefer targeted legislative fixes over comprehensive directive revisions to address generative AI. Rights holders and technology developers should anticipate new rules governing training data usage and opt-out mechanisms. The separation from the CDSM review suggests a faster, albeit potentially fragmented, regulatory approach to emerging AI copyright issues.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and AI developers must prepare for new compliance obligations regarding training data and creator compensation models outside the current CDSM fra…
Practice note: The initiative’s broad scope beyond AI suggests potential legislative bundling, which may complicate negotiations and extend timelines for final adoption.
What to monitor: Watch for specific proposals on clarifying the InfoSoc research exception and introducing an EU-level secondary publication right alongside AI measures.

report_items.title_zh: IPEC裁定：仅含通用词“easy”不构成商标侵权
report_items.title_en: IPEC Rules Common Word Easy Insufficient for Trademark Infringement Finding
report_items.title: IPEC insights: Easygroup v Easyfeetstore - easyGroup’s claims of…
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权企业法院裁定，EasyGroup未能证明被告使用“EASYFEET”侵犯其商标权或构成假冒。法官指出，“easy”为描述性词汇，原告虽主张商标家族概念，但长期未能提供证据证明消费者将该前缀单独关联至原告。因缺乏商品相似性及混淆证据，侵权、声誉损害及商标无效主张均被驳回。
report_items.summary_en: The Intellectual Property Enterprise Court rejected easyGroup’s infringement and passing off claims against Easyfeetstore regarding orthopaedic insoles. The court held that the descriptive term “easy” alone does not establish a link to easyGroup’s brand family. Despite asserting rights across seventy-six prior claims, easyGroup failed to provide evidence that consumers associate the “easy” prefix exclusively with its entities. With no similarity in goods or services for most marks and no evidence of actual confusion, the court found no likelihood of confusion or unfair advantage. Consequently...
core_points_zh: 法院认定仅拥有通用词“easy”不足以判定EASYFEET构成侵权，该词具有显著描述性
原告未能提供证据证明消费者将“easy”前缀视为对其品牌的单独指代，混淆主张失败
因侵权及假冒主张不成立，基于此提出的被告商标无效宣告请求亦被法院驳回
core_points_en: Descriptive term easy alone insufficient to prove consumer association with easyGroup brand family without specific evidence.
Court found no similarity in goods or services and no actual confusion, leading to dismissal of infringement claims.
Invalidity claim against defendant’s trademark failed as it depended on establishing prior infringement or passing off liability.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案重申商标纠纷高度依赖具体事实。即便拥有庞大商标家族，若核心要素为描述性词汇且缺乏实际混淆证据，难以通过商标家族理论扩张保护范围。权利人需注重积累市场认知证据，而非仅依赖注册数量。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment highlights the limitations of trademark family doctrines when the common element is highly descriptive. Rights holders must substantiate acquired distinctiveness and consumer recognition with concrete market evidence rather than relying solely on portfolio size. For practitioners, it underscores the necessity of demonstrating actual confusion or a tangible link between marks in infringement actions invo...
insight_points_zh: 商标家族保护需以核心要素具备显著性及公众认知为基础，描述性词汇难获宽泛保护
实际混淆证据的缺失往往直接导致侵权及声誉损害主张失败，举证责任关键
后续应关注权利人在类似案件中是否能补充提交关于消费者认知的实质性市场证据
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Owners of large trademark families containing descriptive terms must actively gather evidence of consumer recognition to enforce rights effectively.
Practice note: Courts require proof that the common element signals origin specifically to the claimant, not just general brand awareness, to find infringement.
What to monitor: Future attempts by easyGroup or similar entities to supplement evidentiary records with detailed consumer surveys in subsequent enforcement actions.

daily_report.executive_line_en: The UPC Court of Appeal establishes final decision powers, while the UK increases trademark fees and the EU prepares new AI copyright legislation to address generative technology challenges.
daily_report.summary_en: European IP developments this week highlight judicial efficiency and administrative tightening. The UPC Court of Appeal clarified in Rematec v. Europe Forestry that it generally issues final decisions on infringement when setting aside first-instance judgments, reducing remand uncertainties. Simultaneously, the UPC Milan Local Division ruled for Pirelli against two Chinese tire manufacturers, signaling robust cross-border enforcement. In the UK, official trademark fees increased by an average of twenty-five percent, aiming to curb speculative filings, while the UKIPO released guidance to help consumers identify counterfeit fashion in secondary markets. Germany’s DPMA reported a twenty-five point eight percent surge in battery technology patent applications, dominated by Asian applicants, indicating intense competition in energy storage innovation. Additionally, the Düsseldorf Regional Court recognized the Fender Stratocaster body as protected applied art. At the EU level, the Commission confirmed plans for targeted copyright legislation addressing generative AI, separate from existing directive reviews, aiming to rebalance text and data mining exceptions with rightholder interests.
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC Court of Appeal clarified its authority to issue final infringement decisions, reducing procedural delays.
UK trademark official fees increased by twenty-five percent, impacting portfolio budgeting strategies.
European Commission confirmed independent legislative intervention for generative AI copyright issues.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor initial enforcement actions following UKIPO second-hand counterfeit guidance release.
Track appeal filings and injunction enforcement in the Pirelli UPC patent case.
Watch for detailed timelines regarding the EU Commission's AI copyright legislative proposal.

EU Commission initiates targeted AI copyright legislative process
business_actions_en: Reevaluate UK trademark budgets to prioritize core classes amid higher official fees.
Conduct rigorous freedom-to-operate searches for battery technologies due to dense Asian patent filings in Germany.
Update anti-counterfeiting protocols for resale channels to align with new UKIPO consumer guidance.

Precedential value of UPC final infringement rulings
Enforcement cases arising from UK second-hand market guidance
quick_takeaways_en: UPC appeals now likely end with final infringement determinations.
UK trademark costs have risen significantly, affecting filing strategies.
Battery tech patent activity is surging, dominated by Asian applicants.

UPC Milan Division active in cross-border disputes
strategic_implications_en: Litigation strategies must adapt to UPC's final decision tendency.
Brand owners need clearer authenticity markers for resale markets.
R&D in energy storage requires careful navigation of crowded patent fields.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC判例确立程序边界，英德强化IP执法
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Clarifies Procedural Boundaries; UK and Germany Tighten IP Enforcement
weekly_report.executive_line: UPC上诉庭明确管辖权与实体审理界限，提升诉讼效率；英国上调商标费率并打击二手假冒，德国警示恶意注册风险。欧洲IP环境趋向高成本、严合规与快裁决。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP态势呈现“程序提速”与“执法收紧”双重特征。统一专利法院（UPC）通过系列裁定厘清初步异议范围及语言规则，确立高效审理导向，并在倍耐力案中对中国企业作出侵权判决。英国UKIPO发布二手时尚防伪指南并上调25%商标官费，德国DPMA警示AI驱动的恶意商标注册激增。欧盟层面则聚焦生成式AI版权立法盲点及量子技术专利布局缺口，显示政策制定正从传统保护向新兴技术治理深度延伸。

report_items.title_zh: 放心购买二手商品：避免假冒时尚新品指南
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Avoiding Counterfeit Goods in Second-Hand Fashion Market
report_items.title: Shop second-hand with confidence
report_items.summary_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，旨在帮助消费者在蓬勃发展的二手市场中避免购买到假冒时尚商品。此前数据显示，四分之一的消费者曾在不知情的情况下买到假货。该指南支持购物者充分利用英国二手市场，同时提升对假冒产品的识别能力。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued new government guidance designed to help consumers avoid purchasing counterfeit fashion items. This initiative supports shoppers in navigating the UK's growing pre-loved market, addressing concerns that one in four buyers previously acquired fake goods unknowingly. The guidance aims to enhance consumer confidence and awareness regarding product authenticity in second-hand transactions.
core_points_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品
背景数据显示，此前有四分之一的消费者曾在不知情下购买了假冒时尚产品
指南旨在支持购物者安全利用英国繁荣的二手（pre-loved）消费市场
core_points_en: New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets.
Data indicates one in four shoppers previously bought fakes without realizing it.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This publication highlights official attention to trademark infringement risks within the expanding second-hand economy. For rights holders, it signals a continued focus on consumer education as a complement to enforcement. Stakeholders should observe if this guidance leads to updated platform obligations or specific compliance expectations for resellers.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official consumer advice.
Practice note: The guidance underscores the importance of clear authenticity markers for goods entering the secondary market to reduce consumer confusion.
What to monitor: Watch for any subsequent updates linking this consumer guidance to specific enforcement actions or platform liability frameworks.

report_items.title_zh: 指南：如何在二手购物时识别假冒时尚商品
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Identifying Counterfeit Fashion in Second-Hand Markets
report_items.title: Guidance: How to spot fake fashion when shopping second-hand
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布指南，旨在帮助消费者理解如何识别在转售平台上销售的假冒产品，并提供举报相关 listings 的具体步骤。该文件属于官方发布的操作指引，聚焦于二手市场中的知识产权侵权识别与应对流程。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published guidance to assist consumers in identifying counterfeit fashion items sold through second-hand resale platforms. The document outlines practical steps for recognizing fake products and provides instructions on how to report suspicious listings. This resource aims to enhance awareness of trademark infringement risks within the secondary market, offering a structured approach for rights holders and buyers to address potential counterfeiting issues on digital marketplaces.
core_points_zh: 原文摘要显示，指南核心目的是帮助识别转售平台上的假冒产品
原文明确指出，指南包含举报可疑 listings 的具体操作步骤
core_points_en: Guidance helps identify counterfeit fashion products on resale platforms.
Document outlines specific steps for reporting suspicious listings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance highlights regulatory attention to trademark enforcement in the growing second-hand economy. For brand owners, it underscores the importance of clear consumer education and accessible reporting mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms integrate these identification tips into their compliance frameworks may reveal evolving standards for intermediary liability and user-generated content moderation in the UK.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands should review if their anti-counterfeiting materials align with UKIPO identification criteria for secondary markets.
Practice note: The guidance emphasizes consumer participation in enforcement by providing clear reporting pathways for suspicious listings.
What to monitor: Observe whether resale platforms update their terms or detection tools in response to this official guidance.

report_items.title_zh: DPMA 2025年报：电池技术专利申请大幅增长
report_items.title_en: DPMA 2025 Annual Report: Battery Technology Patent Filings Surge Significantly
report_items.title: DPMA-Jahresbericht 2025: Patentanmeldungen zur Batterietechnik enorm gestiegen
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）发布2025年年度报告，重点统计了专利、实用新型等申请数据。报告显示，2025年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增长25.8%至9090件。尽管德国本土申请显著增加并排名第四，但亚洲申请人仍主导德国市场的电池专利排名。此外，风能专利申请量亦有所上升。报告强调知识产权保护对进步至关重要。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has published its 2025 Annual Report, highlighting statistical trends in patents, utility models, trademarks, and designs. A key finding is a 25.8 percent year-on-year increase in published patent applications for battery technology, totaling 9,090 filings. While Asian applicants continue to dominate the rankings for the German market, domestic filings from German companies and research institutions have risen substantially, securing fourth place. The report also notes an increase in wind power patent applications. Available in digital HTML and PD...
core_points_zh: 年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速
亚洲国家主导德国市场电池专利申请排名，德国本土申请大增位列第四
DPMA发布2025年报，涵盖专利统计及数字时代知识产权保护趋势分析
core_points_en: Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics in the sector.
Asian applicants dominate battery patent rankings in Germany, while domestic German filings increased significantly to reach fourth place.
The report highlights rising wind power patent applications and provides guidance on digital brand protection and design rights.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This data underscores the intensifying competitive landscape in energy storage within the German jurisdiction. Rights holders should note the strong presence of Asian entities and the growing domestic activity. Monitoring these publication trends is essential for understanding technological evolution and assessing the density of prior art in battery and renewable energy sectors.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects targeting the German market.
Practice note: The DPMA’s analysis combines national and European patent data effective in Germany, offering a comprehensive view of protection strategies employed by competitors.
What to monitor: Track the specific technical subclasses within battery and wind power filings to identify emerging sub-technologies and key active assignees.

report_items.title_zh: 智能球门、护腿板及捡球机器人：DPMA更新足球技术画廊
report_items.title_en: DPMA Expands Football and Technology Gallery for 2026 World Cup
report_items.title: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）借2026年美加墨世界杯之机，扩展其“足球与技术”在线画廊。该画廊收录了全球范围内过去125年间与足球相关的专利文献，涵盖门线技术、视频助理裁判、生物数据监测传感器及AI驱动设备等创新。DPMA旨在通过展示这些发明，强调知识产权保护在挖掘足球领域经济潜力中的重要作用。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has expanded its online gallery, Football and Technology, to coincide with the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico, and the USA. The updated collection features patent documents spanning 125 years of innovation, ranging from early mechanical equipment like screw-in studs to modern digital solutions. New additions include AI-controlled safety nets, ball-collecting robots, smart goals, and intelligent shin guards. The gallery also details established technologies such as goal-line technology and video assistant refereeing. DPMA President Eva Schew...
core_points_zh: DPMA为配合2026年世界杯，更新了展示全球足球相关专利的在线画廊
展出内容涵盖从传统机械装备到AI、机器人及生物数据监测等现代技术创新
DPMA主席指出，该画廊证实专利保护是利用足球发明经济潜力的重要工具
core_points_en: DPMA updates its online gallery with recent patents including AI-driven safety nets and robotics.
The collection covers 125 years of football innovations, from mechanical gear to digital tech.
The initiative highlights the role of IP protection in maximizing the economic value of sports inventions.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This update serves primarily as a public awareness initiative rather than a legal precedent. For rights holders, it underscores the DPMA’s view of IP as a key driver for commercializing sports technology. Practitioners may find value in reviewing how the office categorizes emerging fields like wearable sensors and AI-assisted officiating within historical patent contexts.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates the DPMA's strategic emphasis on IP as a tool for commercializing sports-related innovations and protecting R&D investments.
Practice note: The gallery offers a structured view of how mechanical and digital football technologies are documented, aiding prior art searches in sports equipment sectors.
What to monitor: Observe if future updates include detailed case studies on the patentability boundaries of AI-driven officiating or real-time biometric data processing.

report_items.title_zh: 英国商标注册簿150周年：律所代理的标志性品牌回顾
report_items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Register at 150: Iconic Brands and Historical Milestones
report_items.title: 150 years of the UK trade mark register: iconic brands we represent
report_items.summary_zh: 为纪念英国商标注册簿成立150周年，D Young & Co回顾了自1876年首个商标（Bass红三角）注册以来的历史。文章列举了该律所代理的多个维多利亚时代起源的知名品牌，包括Grants Morella樱桃白兰地、Ardbeg威士忌、Listerine漱口水、Vicks Vaporub、Fairy肥皂、Anusol药品及Gillette剃须刀，并详述了它们在英国的首次注册时间与背景，展示了英国商标体系的长期演变。
report_items.summary_en: Marking the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, D Young & Co reflects on historic registrations starting with the Bass red triangle in 1876. The firm highlights long-standing client brands such as Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, Ardbeg, Listerine, Vicks Vaporub, Fairy, and Anusol. These examples illustrate the continuity of protection for diverse goods, from spirits to pharmaceuticals, with many marks originating in the Victorian era. The analysis underscores the stability of the UK system, noting that early registrations remain active today alongside millions of newer entries, demo...
core_points_zh: 英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效
律所代理的最古老商标为1876年注册的Grants Morella樱桃白兰地图形商标
列举了Ardbeg、Listerine、Vicks等品牌在20世纪初获得英国商标保护的…
core_points_en: The first UK trade mark, Bass red triangle, was registered on 1 January 1876 and remains protected today.
D Young & Co represents Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, its oldest client mark, registered in June 1876.
Iconic brands like Ardbeg, Listerine, and Fairy secured early UK registrations between 1903 and 1911.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文主要为律所品牌宣传与历史回顾，通过展示长期代理的经典案例体现专业能力。对于关注英国市场的企业而言，这些百年品牌的持续注册状态证明了英国商标制度的稳定性。实务中可参考此类长寿品牌的维护策略，但文中未涉及具体法律争议或最新审查标准变化，仅作历史性事实陈述。
report_items.insight_en: This retrospective highlights the longevity of UK trade mark rights, offering reassurance regarding the stability of the register. For rights holders, it emphasizes the strategic value of maintaining historic marks. While primarily illustrative, it reminds practitioners that early adoption of registration provides lasting competitive advantages and brand equity preservation across generations.
insight_points_zh: 英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护
传统快消与医药品牌在英国商标历史上占据重要地位，注册历史悠久
律所通过展示长期客户案例，强调其在英国商标领域的资深经验与稳定性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Historic brands demonstrate that continuous use and renewal can sustain trade mark rights for over a century, reinforcing long-term asset value.
Practice note: Early registration dates, such as those for Ardbeg and Listerine, show how foundational marks were secured before modern classification systems fully evolved.
What to monitor: Track the status of legacy marks to ensure compliance with current use requirements while leveraging their historical distinctiveness in enforcement.

report_items.title_zh: 2026年5月商标法律与实务概览
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Trade Mark Fee Increases Effective April 2026: Key Updates
report_items.title: Trade Mark Law & Practice at a Glance – May 2026 - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE发布2026年5月商标法律与实务更新。核心事实为自2026年4月1日起，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）新收费标准生效，整体平均涨幅达25%。具体包括在线提交英国商标申请费由170英镑涨至205英镑，每增加一个类别的费用由50英镑涨至60英镑。
report_items.summary_en: GJE’s May 2026 trade mark law update highlights significant changes to UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) fees. Effective 1 April 2026, new official fees came into force, representing an average increase of 25 percent across various procedures. Specifically, the cost for filing a UK trade mark application online has risen from GBP 170 to GBP 205. Additionally, the fee for each additional class included in an application has increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60. These adjustments impact the baseline costs for securing trade mark protection in the United Kingdom. Rights holders and applicants ma...
core_points_zh: 年4月1日起UKIPO新费率生效，平均涨幅25%
英国商标在线申请费从170英镑上调至205英镑
商标申请每增加一个类别的费用从50英镑上调至60英镑
core_points_en: New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase.
Online UK trade mark application fees rose from GBP 170 to GBP 205 per application.
Fees for each additional class in a trade mark application increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The 25 percent average fee increase materially affects the cost structure for UK trade mark registrations. In-house counsel and brand owners should recalibrate annual IP budgets to accommodate higher filing costs, particularly for multi-class applications. While the base filing fee rise is notable, the incremental cost per additional class also warrants review for portfolio optimization. Practitioners should ensure t...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.
Practice note: The increase in per-class fees may influence decisions on class breadth versus separate filings in portfolio management.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO communications regarding potential procedural changes or additional fee adjustments in other trademark-related services.

report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules on Final Decisions and Legal Interest in Rematec v Europe Forestry
report_items.title: Court of Appeal to rule on major points even if missing from first instance decision (UPC_CoA_302/2025, UPC_CoA_305/2025)
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院在Rematec诉Europe Forestry案中推翻曼海姆分院判决，认定专利有效且侵权。裁决明确：若独立权利要求无效导致撤销反诉失败，无需审查从属权利要求充分性；上诉院通常应自行作出终局裁决而非发回重审，除非例外情况；发布判决需证明原告存在合法利益。
report_items.summary_en: In Rematec v. Europe Forestry, the UPC Court of Appeal clarified procedural standards under the UPCA. It held that assessing sufficiency for dependent claims is unnecessary if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim due to lack of legal interest. Under Article 75(1) UPCA, the Court of Appeal generally issues a final decision when setting aside a first instance judgment, including ruling on infringement. Referral back to the first instance is exceptional; the lower court’s prior omission of infringement findings, based on invalidity, does not typically justify remand. Additional...
core_points_zh: 若针对独立权利要求的撤销反诉已失败，因缺乏法律利益，无需审查从属权利要求是否充分公开
依据UPCA第75条，上诉院撤销初审判决后通常应自行作出终局裁决，包括对侵权诉讼作出决定
初审未裁决侵权问题通常不构成发回重审的例外情形；发布判决需考量原告是否存在合法利益
core_points_en: No legal interest exists to assess dependent claim sufficiency if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim.
The Court of Appeal generally renders a final decision on infringement when setting aside a first instance judgment.
Failure of the first instance to rule on infringement due to invalidity does not normally justify referral back.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment reinforces the UPC Court of Appeal’s role in delivering final resolutions, minimizing referrals back to the first instance even when infringement was not previously examined. Rights holders should anticipate comprehensive appellate rulings covering both validity and infringement. Furthermore, parties seeking publication of decisions must proactively substantiate their legitimate interest, as such orders...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appellate proceedings may now conclude with binding infringement findings, reducing prolonged litigation cycles through remands.
Practice note: Claimants must explicitly plead and evidence legitimate interest when requesting publication of judgments under Article 80 UPCA.
What to monitor: Future applications of the ‘exceptional circumstances’ test for referrals back to the first instance under Rule 242.2(b) RoP.

report_items.title_zh: 量子计算第二部分：量子时代的知识产权
report_items.title_en: Quantum Computing IP: EU Patent Output Lags Behind Company Presence
report_items.title: Quantum Computing — Part 2: Intellectual Property In The Quantum Age
report_items.summary_zh: 本文指出专利对保护量子行业创新至关重要，涵盖硬件、软件及算法等领域。尽管欧盟拥有全球32%的量子科技公司，但其相关专利仅占全球6%，远低于中国和美国。不过，2021至2024年间欧盟量子专利申请量翻倍，显示意识提升。芬兰表现突出，在欧洲量子专利申请中排名第四。
report_items.summary_en: Patents are critical for protecting innovations in quantum computing, communication, and sensing. While the EU hosts 32% of global quantum companies, it accounts for only 6% of related patents, trailing China and the US. However, EU patent filings doubled between 2021 and 2024, signaling increased strategic awareness. Finland ranks fourth globally in quantum patent activity per EPO and OECD data. The analysis highlights hardware infrastructure, including cryogenic systems and error correction, as significant areas for patentable innovation alongside core algorithms and software.
core_points_zh: 欧盟量子企业数量占全球32%，但相关专利仅占全球6%，存在产出缺口
至2024年欧盟量子技术专利申请量翻倍，反映IP保护意识增强
芬兰在量子技术专利申请方面表现优异，居欧洲第四，体现其生态优势
core_points_en: EU hosts 32% of quantum firms but holds only 6% of global patents, revealing a significant output gap.
Quantum patent filings in the EU doubled from 2021 to 2024, indicating growing IP protection awareness.
Finland ranks fourth globally in quantum patent activity, highlighting specific regional strengths within Europe.
report_items.insight_zh: 欧盟量子产业面临专利产出与企业规模不匹配的挑战，但近期申请量增长显示积极趋势。从业者需关注量子技术快速迭代对专利生命周期的影响，以及欧洲在硬件基础设施等领域的专利布局机会。
report_items.insight_en: European rights holders should address the disparity between market presence and patent volume by securing rights in hardware infrastructure and algorithms. The recent surge in filings suggests a maturing portfolio strategy. Monitoring high-activity jurisdictions like Finland can inform competitive benchmarking and collaboration opportunities in the evolving quantum landscape.
insight_points_zh: 欧盟量子企业需加强专利布局以匹配其市场地位，弥补与中美差距
量子技术迭代速度快于专利审批周期，可能导致授权前技术过时风险
关注芬兰等欧洲国家在量子生态中的专利活跃度及潜在合作机会
insight_points_en: Client relevance: EU-based quantum entities must align IP portfolios with their market share to mitigate competitive disadvantages against US and Chinese rivals.
Practice note: Drafting strategies should encompass physical infrastructure, such as cryogenic cooling and control electronics, not just core quantum algorithms.
What to monitor: Track the sustained growth in EU quantum patent filings and specific national trends, such as Finland’s high-ranking performance.

These filings often target signs used by third parties without formal protection, aiming to exert competitive pressure rather than indicate commercial origin. Contributing factors include AI tools that identify unregistered signs and online marketplace enforcement mechanisms that allow swift blocking of competitors. weekly_report.executive_line_en: The UPC defines procedural limits to accelerate litigation, while the UK raises trademark fees and Germany warns of AI-driven bad faith filings, signaling a shift toward stricter compliance.
weekly_report.summary_en: This week, the European IP landscape featured accelerated procedural clarity and tightened enforcement mechanisms. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal restricted preliminary objections to jurisdictional issues, preventing substantive delays, and permitted English oral pleadings to enhance efficiency. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office increased trademark application fees by twenty-five percent and issued new guidance for identifying counterfeit goods in second-hand fashion markets. In Germany, the DPMA reported a significant rise in bad faith trademark registrations facilitated by AI tools, alongside a twenty-five percent surge in battery technology patent filings, predominantly from Asian applicants. At the EU level, the Commission launched a targeted copyright initiative addressing generative AI challenges, separate from ongoing directive reviews. Additionally, the EUIPO Grand Board refused the GEORGE ORWELL trademark for media goods, citing descriptiveness. These developments indicate a regulatory environment increasingly focused on procedural speed, cost adjustments, and proactive measures against emerging risks in digital and secondary markets.

UK trademark official fees increased by twenty-five percent, significantly altering registration cost structures
German authorities explicitly identified AI tools as accelerants for bad faith trademark registration risks
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor UPC Milan Division for further details on enforcement measures in recent infringement judgments

AI tools are increasingly exploited for bad faith filings, requiring vigilant monitoring
rising_themes_en: Refinement and efficiency orientation of UPC procedural rules
Regulatory scrutiny of intellectual property compliance in secondary markets
cooling_themes_en: Prolonged adversarial proceedings in traditional trademark opposition contexts
Isolated patent litigation confined to single national jurisdictions

strategic_implications_en: Multinational enterprises must adapt litigation strategies to align with UPC accelerated timelines
Brand owners in UK and German markets need comprehensive anti-counterfeiting and anti-squatting strategies
High-tech firms should address patent gaps in emerging fields like quantum computing to secure competitive advantage
weekly_report.weekly_thesis_en: The European IP system is enhancing judicial efficiency through UPC procedural reforms while strengthening market-side enforcement via cost adjustments and administrative guidance in key jurisdictions to address AI and green technology challenges.

daily_audio_latest.headline_zh: UPC判例确立终审权，英德执法趋严
daily_audio_latest.headline_en: UPC Asserts Finality; UK Fees Rise and Germany Tightens Enforcement
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本窗口欧洲IP态势呈现“司法确权”与“行政收紧”双轨并行。UPC上诉院通过新判例强化终审效率，米兰分院裁定中国胎企侵权，显示跨境执法力度加大。英国UKIPO发布二手时尚防伪指南并上调25%商标费率，压缩低成本注册空间。德国DPMA数据显示电池技术专利申请激增，亚洲主导市场。欧盟层面正酝酿针对生成式AI的独立版权立法，以弥补现有文本挖掘例外之不足。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: European IP developments this week highlight judicial efficiency and administrative tightening. The UPC Court of Appeal clarified in Rematec v. Europe Forestry that it generally issues final decisions on infringement when setting aside first-instance judgments, reducing remand uncertainties. Simultaneously, the UPC Milan Local Division ruled for Pirelli against two Chinese tire manufacturers, signaling robust cross-border enforcement. In the UK, official trademark fees increased by an average of twenty-five percent, aiming to curb speculative filings, while the UKIPO released guidance to help consumers identify counterfeit fashion in secondary markets. Germany’s DPMA reported a twenty-five point eight percent surge in battery technology patent applications, dominated by Asian applicants, indicating intense competition in energy storage innovation. Additionally, the Düsseldorf Regional Court recognized the Fender Stratocaster body as protected applied art. At the EU level, the Commission confirmed plans for targeted copyright legislation addressing generative AI, separate from existing directive reviews, aiming to rebalance text and data mining exceptions with rightholder interests.

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年5月29日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品。后续要看英国会不会围绕这类官方动向继续给出配套安排或更明确口径。
再看第二条，原文摘要显示，指南核心目的是帮助识别转售平台上的假冒产品。后续要看英国会不会围绕这类官方动向继续给出配套安排或更明确口径。
再看第三条，年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速。后续要看德国披露的关键指标会不会延续当前趋势，并影响外界判断。
最后看第四条，英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效。值得关注的是，英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕商标、专利、版权展开，接下来值得继续关注欧盟AI版权立法草案细节。

再看第三条，年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速。后续要看德国披露的关键指标会不会延续当前趋势，并影响外界判断。
最后看第四条，英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效。值得关注的是，英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕商标、专利、版权展开，接下来值得继续关注欧盟AI版权立法草案细节。

topics.headline_zh: UPC判例趋严与中国申请量跃升
topics.headline_en: UPC Precedents Tighten as Chinese Patent Filings Surge in Europe
topics.summary_zh: 2026年Q2，UPC通过杜塞尔多夫扩庭及PMAC系统上线提升效能，但判例显示证据披露、权利要求解释趋严。同期中国首次跻身EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利采纳率近30%。中国企业需警惕程序合规风险，利用ADR机制降本，并优化在欧专利布局以应对高强度诉讼环境。
key_points: UPC程序与机构扩容：杜塞尔多夫设立第二合议庭，PMAC调解系统及规则正式上线，旨在分流案件并降低维权成本。
司法实践趋严：米兰分院确立审查档案限制权利要求解释原则，赫尔辛基分院严格等同侵权判定，证据迟交将被排除。
中国创新地位提升：2025年中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利在中小企业中采纳率显著增长至28.7%。
actions: 严控诉讼程序合规：建立证据前置披露清单，避免迟交证据被排除；在授权阶段保持陈述一致性，防止审查档案限缩保护范围。
活用ADR替代争议解决：针对SEP或复杂纠纷，优先评估使用PMAC调解机制，以降低在欧诉讼成本并缩短解决周期。
优化欧洲专利布局策略：结合中国申请量上升趋势，重新评估核心产品在德法荷等热门分院的防御性布局，审慎使用功能性限定。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院关于管辖权范围向欧盟法院提请裁决的最终结果
2027年EPO指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明的具体执行标准
主要分院（如杜塞尔多夫、慕尼黑）在间接侵权及等同原则上的判例一致性
topics.summary_en: In Q2 2026, the Unified Patent Court enhanced operational capacity through the establishment of a second panel in Düsseldorf and the launch of the PMAC digital case management system. Concurrently, judicial precedents indicate stricter standards for evidence disclosure, claim interpretation, and equivalence assessments. Market data reveals China has entered the top three countries of origin for European Patent Office applications, while Unitary Patent adoption reached 28.7%, driven significantly by small and medium-sized enterprises. These developments signal a maturing litigation environment with heightened procedural rigor. Stakeholders must navigate increased compliance demands while leveraging new alternative dispute resolution mechanisms. Strategic portfolio adjustments are essential to address the evolving balance between expansive filing trends and concentrated enforcement risks i...
key_points_en: The UPC expanded judicial capacity in Düsseldorf and launched the PMAC mediation platform to streamline case management and reduce litigation costs.
Recent rulings from Milan and Helsinki divisions enforce stricter limits on claim interpretation via prosecution history and exclude late-filed evidence.
China ranked among the top three EPO filing sources in 2025, coinciding with a 28.7% Unitary Patent uptake rate led by SMEs.
actions_en: Enforce strict procedural compliance by preparing early evidence disclosure lists and maintaining consistency between prosecution statements and claim scope.
Evaluate PMAC mediation and arbitration options for standard-essential patent or complex cross-border disputes to optimize cost and timeline efficiency.
Refine European portfolio strategies by reassessing defensive positions in key divisions like Düsseldorf and limiting functional claim limitations where appropriate.
watchlist_en: Final outcome of the UPC Court of Appeal referral to the CJEU regarding jurisdictional scope.
Implementation standards for mandatory amendment basis indications in the 2027 EPO Guidelines revision.
Consistency of case law on indirect infringement and equivalence principles across major divisions such as Düsseldorf and Munich.

topics.headline_zh: 欧SEP诉讼激化与费率裁决冲突
topics.headline_en: Escalating European SEP Litigation and Conflicting Global Rate Determinations
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲SEP诉讼呈爆发态势，UPC与英国法院成为核心战场。英高院裁定三星-ZTE全球费率，与中方判决形成直接冲突；UPC频繁签发禁诉令压制中国临时许可申请。诺基亚、华为等巨头在车联网及流媒体领域攻防激烈，司法碎片化加剧，许可不确定性显著上升。
key_points: 管辖权冲突升级：英国法院确立全球FRAND费率裁定权，与中方判决产生直接抵触；UPC积极签发反反诉禁令，限制实施者在中国寻求临时许可。
程序策略转向：英国上诉法院在Acer/Nokia案中强化仲裁条款效力，拒绝管辖；UPC打破德国传统，尝试直接裁定FRAND费率并推动调解。
行业维权扩张：SEP战火从手机蔓延至智能汽车（吉利/诺基亚和解）及流媒体（华为诉迪士尼），NPE利用UPC作为战略诉讼平台施压。
actions: 审查许可协议中的UPC退出机制及仲裁条款，明确决策权归属，规避集中无效风险及管辖权被动。
建立SEP侵权预警与快速响应机制，收到通知须立即书面表达许可意愿，以防在UPC或德国法院丧失抗辩权。
评估中英平行诉讼策略，谨慎应对跨国禁诉令风险，统筹全球费率谈判以避免相互矛盾的司法裁决。
watchlist: 英国最高法院关于专利池FRAND义务及Unwired Planet后续案件的最终判决风向。
UPC上诉法院对禁诉令（ASI/AASI）及全球费率管辖权的进一步判例界定。
欧盟SEP新规立法进程及英国IPO监管框架改革对许可透明度的具体影响。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, Standard-Essential Patent litigation in Europe intensified, with the Unified Patent Court and UK courts emerging as primary forums. The UK High Court established global FRAND rates in Samsung v ZTE, creating direct conflict with Chinese judgments. Simultaneously, the UPC frequently issued anti-anti-suit injunctions to counter interim license applications filed in China. Major entities like Nokia and Huawei engaged in aggressive enforcement across automotive and streaming sectors. This judicial fragmentation has significantly increased licensing uncertainty. Procedural shifts include the UK Court of Appeal prioritizing arbitration clauses and the UPC attempting direct FRAND rate determinations. Implementers face heightened risks from centralized validity attacks and strict willingness requirements, necessitating coordinated global strategies to navigate conf...

Procedural strategies are shifting, with the UK Court of Appeal enforcing arbitration clauses to decline jurisdiction, and the UPC moving beyond German traditions by directly deter...
SEP enforcement is expanding beyond smartphones into smart vehicles and streaming services, with non-practicing entities leveraging the UPC as a strategic platform to pressure impl...
actions_en: Review license agreements to clarify UPC opt-out mechanisms and arbitration clauses, ensuring clear decision-making authority to mitigate centralized validity risks and passive jur...
Establish rapid response protocols for SEP infringement notices, requiring immediate written expressions of licensing willingness to preserve FRAND defenses in UPC and German proce...
Evaluate parallel litigation strategies in the UK and China, carefully managing cross-border injunction risks and coordinating global rate negotiations to avoid contradictory judic...
watchlist_en: Final judgments from the UK Supreme Court regarding patent pool FRAND obligations and subsequent Unwired Planet precedents.
UPC Court of Appeal decisions further defining the scope of anti-suit injunctions and jurisdiction over global FRAND rate determinations.
Legislative progress on EU SEP regulations and UK IPO regulatory reforms impacting licensing transparency and dispute resolution frameworks.

topics.headline_zh: EUIPO执法趋严与权利边界重塑
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Enforcement and Redefines Trademark Rights Boundaries
topics.summary_zh: 本季度EUIPO强化数字执法协作，DesignView升级为全球最大外观搜索引擎。司法层面明确脱欧后英国未注册商标失效，并细化名人姓名及驰名商标保护标准。同时，手工艺地理标志制度落地，中小企业获融资与费用支持。欧盟正构建更严密、数字化的IP保护网，中企需警惕合规风险并利用政策红利。
key_points: 执法数字化：EUIPO联合欧委会打击网假，DesignView成全球最大外观库，IPEP工具强化实时执法。
确权新界限：法院裁定脱欧后纯英国未注册商标无效；名人姓名在内容类商品上易被拒；驰名商标评估需全局考量。
制度与扶持：首个手工艺GI诞生；推出IP融资合作及SME基金，降低进入门槛并提升资产变现能力。
actions: 排查英国市场权利：确认在英未注册商标状态，必要时重新申请欧盟商标以填补脱欧后的保护真空。
优化外观检索策略：利用新版DesignView进行全球外观查重，规避侵权风险并监控竞争对手设计动态。
申请SME基金补贴：符合条件的中小企业应积极申请EUIPO费用报销，降低欧盟商标及外观注册成本。
watchlist: 德国恶意注册趋势：关注DPMA对利用AI及电商机制进行恶意抢注的打击口径及案例演变。
手工艺GI扩展：观察欧盟手工艺和工业地理标志后续开放注册的品类及对中国传统工艺的潜在影响。
在线平台责任：追踪EUIPO与欧委会联合行动中，对电商平台审核义务及下架机制的最新执行标准。
topics.summary_en: The EUIPO has intensified digital enforcement collaborations, upgrading DesignView into the global leading design search engine and deploying the IPEP tool for real-time action. Judicial developments clarify that UK unregistered rights cannot support EU oppositions post-Brexit, while new standards restrict registering celebrity names for content-related goods and refine well-known mark assessments. Concurrently, the EU implemented craft geographical indications and launched IP-backed financing initiatives with the European Investment Fund to support SMEs. These shifts create a stricter, digitized protection framework. Rights holders must address compliance risks, particularly regarding bad faith filings in Germany and online platform liabilities, while leveraging available subsidies and enhanced search tools to optimize portfolio management and asset valuation.
key_points_en: Digital enforcement scales up: DesignView becomes the largest global design database, while IPEP tools and joint actions with Europol strengthen real-time anti-counterfeiting capab...
Rights boundaries clarified: UK-only unregistered marks fail in post-Brexit EU oppositions; celebrity names face refusal for content goods; reputation assessments require comprehen...
SME support expands: New craft geographical indications launch alongside IP-backed financing partnerships and pro bono programs, lowering entry barriers and enhancing asset monetiz...
actions_en: Audit UK rights: Verify status of unregistered UK marks and consider filing EU applications to close protection gaps identified by recent CJEU rulings.
Leverage DesignView: Utilize the expanded global image search functionality for thorough prior art checks and competitive monitoring in design clearance processes.
Access SME funds: Apply for EUIPO reimbursement schemes and explore IP-backed financing options to reduce registration costs and improve capital access.
watchlist_en: German bad faith trends: Monitor DPMA crackdowns on AI-driven speculative filings targeting unregistered signs used by third parties.
Craft GI evolution: Track advisory board guidelines for new craft and industrial geographical indications and their impact on traditional products.
Platform liability standards: Observe evolving execution criteria for online marketplace takedowns under joint EUIPO and European Commission enforcement initiatives.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化假冒执法与资金保障
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Strengthen Counterfeit Enforcement and Funding Commitments
topics.summary_zh: 2026年春，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧盟委员会聚焦网络侵权，并支持SHIELD VI等跨国行动；英国UKIPO确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并计划扩编。执法呈现跨机构协作、针对有组织犯罪及强化在线监管趋势，中企需警惕合规风险。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO与欧盟委员会联手打击网络假冒，并通过EMPACT框架强化对有组织知识产权犯罪的跨机构协作与公众沟通。
英国动态：UKIPO将IP犯罪专项执法资金延长至2029年，并计划扩大部门规模，显示长期高压执法决心。
行动实效：SHIELD VI行动查获3200万欧元假冒药品，凸显欧洲对高危品类（如医药、耗材）的精准打击能力。
actions: 建立全链路合规溯源体系，确保出口产品（特别是医药、电子耗材）来源可查，防范供应链假冒指控。
加强英国及欧盟市场经销商尽调，避免通过不明渠道低价采购或销售，切断与有组织犯罪网络的潜在关联。
密切关注EUIPO关于在线侵权的最新口径，提前布局电商平台知识产权投诉与防御机制。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络假冒和盗版发布的配套执行细则与明确司法口径。
英国IP犯罪部门扩编的具体时间表、职能范围变化及2029年前的案件查处数据。
EMPACT框架下知识产权犯罪执法的年度优先事项调整及跨成员国协作新动向。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During spring 2026, the European Union and United Kingdom significantly intensified efforts against intellectual property infringement. The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) collaborated with the European Commission to target online counterfeiting and supported Operation SHIELD VI, which seized EUR 32 million in counterfeit medicines. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office confirmed extended funding for its IP Crime Unit through 2029 and indicated plans for operational expansion. These developments highlight a strategic shift toward cross-agency collaboration, targeting organized crime networks, and enhancing digital market oversight. Rights holders should note the increased regulatory scrutiny on high-risk sectors, including pharmaceuticals and electronic consumables. The UK IPO has secured funding for its specialist IP Crime Unit until 2029 and is exploring capacity expansion, demonstrating a sustained commitment to rigorous enforcement.

Conduct enhanced due diligence on distributors in the UK and EU markets to prevent inadvertent engagement with illicit channels or organized crime networks.
Monitor evolving EUIPO guidelines on online infringement and proactively adjust e-commerce enforcement protocols to align with new institutional priorities.
watchlist_en: Upcoming implementing rules and judicial interpretations from the EU regarding online counterfeiting and digital piracy enforcement.

Annual priority adjustments within the EMPACT framework and new trends in cross-member state law enforcement collaboration.
